result.stdout:
LogicBlocksGenerator v0.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet LogicBlocksGenerator.dll [options]
  dotnet LogicBlocksGenerator.dll [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  generate          Generates LogicBlocks files from templates. 

You can run `dotnet LogicBlocksGenerator.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
LogicBlocksGenerator v0.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet LogicBlocksGenerator.dll generate --namespace <value> --name <value> --output <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Generates LogicBlocks files from templates.

OPTIONS
* --namespace       Target C# namespace to inject. 
* --name            Root name used for template substitution. 
* --output          Output directory for generated files. 
  --template        Custom directory containing *.cs.tpl templates. Defaults to packaged template files. Default: "./templates".
  --overwrite       Allow overwriting existing files. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
LogicBlocksGenerator v0.0.0

USAGE
  dotnet LogicBlocksGenerator.dll generate --namespace <value> --name <value> --output <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Generates LogicBlocks files from templates.

OPTIONS
* --namespace       Target C# namespace to inject. 
* --name            Root name used for template substitution. 
* --output          Output directory for generated files. 
  --template        Custom directory containing *.cs.tpl templates. Defaults to packaged template files. Default: "./templates".
  --overwrite       Allow overwriting existing files. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

options.name: name
options.description: Root name used for template substitution.

options.name: template
options.description: Custom directory containing *.cs.tpl templates. Defaults to packaged template files.
